hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 3.07 km from property

address.address1: Jl. Tengku Dlihong 2 No. 9, Lhong Raya

favoriteFeatures.name: Airport transfer

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options.

details.title: Children 0-11 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Things to do, ways to relax

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: They have every basic things you need in a hotel, only thing its location its a bit far from town, but no worries as it is accessible by Grab.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: This stay is so comfy. Calm enviroment. Cheap rate. Easy and close to reach the town. Very worth it money with great value of service and experience.
comments.reviewTitle: Cheap, worth it for money with excellent service and enviroment.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: It was good that there was a Grab service available to compensate for the distance from the city centre

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: spacious room and clean. really worth with the price. just dont have water heater. overall good.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
